title: FlowFrame Wireframe Metadata
description: Metadata schema for FlowFrame wireframe HTML files. Embedded in <script id="flowframe-meta"> block.

purpose.description: One-sentence description of the screen's purpose.

elements.description: List of tracked wireframe elements on this screen.

id.description: Tracked wireframe element ID following FEATURE_{FEATURE_ID}_{ELEMENT_ID} pattern (e.g., FEATURE_AUTH_EMAIL).

featureId.description: Feature ID derived from folder path (e.g., AUTH__LOGIN_FORM, CART_ITEMS). Single underscore joins words, double underscore separates depth levels.

type.description: Wireframe element type (e.g., input, button, link, text, list, table).

label.description: Element label shown in the wireframe panel.

description.description: Element-level description shown in the wireframe panel.

spec.description: Relative path to the leaf feature spec index.md from the screen folder wireframe (e.g., "../../features/auth/login-form/index.md").
